title: creamy crumbly portuguese fish bake
description: a rich and umami portuguese-inspired fish bake featuring fresh thyme and wood-fired crust, perfect for a midnight craving.
instructions: rinse the cod fillets and pat them dry with paper towels.
in a large bowl, mix together flour, oregano, thyme, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
add the crushed crackers to the bowl and mix well.
dip each cod fillet into the flour mixture, coating both sides evenly.
place the coated cod fillets on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
dot the top of each cod fillet with cream cheese, leaving a small border around the edges.
sprinkle grated parmesan cheese over the cream cheese.
place the baking sheet in the preheated wood-fired oven and bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the fish is cooked through and the crust is golden brown.
remove the baking sheet from the oven and drizzle with lemon juice.
serve hot, garnished with fresh thyme leaves if desired.
